message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

title IO Device Registration and Opening Sequence Diagram

participant "arm_io_storage" as arm_io_storage
participant "io_storage" as io_storage
participant "io_fip" as io_fip
participant "io_memmap" as io_memmap

box "io dev registration" #ffffff
    activate arm_io_storage
    arm_io_storage ->> arm_io_storage: arm_io_setup()
    
    arm_io_storage ->> io_fip: register_io_dev_fip(&fip_dev_con)
    activate io_fip
    io_fip ->> io_storage: io_register_device(&dev_info_pool[])
    activate io_storage
    note right of io_storage: devices[dev_count] = (fip_)dev_info_pool\n dev_count++
    deactivate io_storage
    deactivate io_fip
    
    arm_io_storage ->> io_memmap: register_io_dev_memmap(&memmap_dev_con)
    activate io_memmap
    io_memmap ->> io_storage: io_register_device(&memmap_dev_info)
    activate io_storage
    note right of io_storage: devices[dev_count] = memmap_dev_info\n dev_count++
    deactivate io_storage
    deactivate io_memmap
    
    arm_io_storage ->> io_storage: io_dev_open(fip_dev_con, NULL, fip_dev_handle)
    activate io_storage
    io_storage ->> io_storage: dev_open(dev_con, dev_spec, handle)
    
    opt [dev_open() on fip device]
        io_storage ->> io_fip: fip_dev_open(dev_spec, dev_info)
        activate io_fip
        note right of io_fip: dev_info = one of the\n"fip_dev_info" from\ndev_info_pool[]
        deactivate io_fip
    endopt
    
    deactivate io_storage
    
    arm_io_storage ->> io_storage: io_dev_open(memmap_dev_con, NULL, memmap_dev_handle)
    activate io_storage
    io_storage ->> io_storage: dev_open(dev_con, dev_spec, handle)
    
    opt [dev_open() on memmap device]
        io_storage ->> io_memmap: memmap_dev_open(dev_spec, dev_info)
        activate io_memmap
        note right of io_memmap: dev_info = memmap_dev_info
        deactivate io_memmap
    endopt
    
    deactivate io_storage
    deactivate arm_io_storage
endbox

@enduml
```
